description_long: This object is a lifelike bird specimen with a streamlined body, predominantly covered in rich brown and black feathers. The head is dark, almost black, with a subtle gradient into the brown of the back and wings. The underparts are lighter, with some grayish and off-white tones visible along the belly. The beak is slender and slightly curved, typical of many passerine birds, and the tail is long and straight, tapering to a point. The legs are thin and appear to be a muted brown or gray color, partially tucked under the body. The overall feather pattern is smooth with subtle color transitions, lacking bold spots or stripes.
description: A realistic bird with brown and black plumage, slender curved beak, and a long pointed tail. The body features smooth color gradients and subtle feather patterns.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bird, highlighting the brown back, black head, and long pointed tail.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow head, dark beak, and the symmetry of the body and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the brown and black feather transition and the tucked legs.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail's pointed shape and the gradient from brown to black along the back.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Smooth gradient from dark head to rufous-brown back and wings, with lighter underparts and minimal patterning.
